title: oxalis villosula
intro: Oxalis villosula, also known as hairy wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalis genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Oxalis villosula has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
